MATTHEW WHITE/JUDGE PRO TEM;BCHIN/CLERK;PDOWLING/CRC MARC SEIDENFELD SPECIAL APPEARENCE WITH PLAINTIFF FLORENCE FUNG. DEFENDANTS ROY & DEBORAH TANNER PRESENT IN PRO PER. CASE SETTLED, TERMS ON THE RECORD. PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY TO PREPARE THE TERMS OF THE SETTLEMENT.

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 02, DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, CALENDAR OF JUL-28-1997, OFF CALENDAR FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED.
TRIAL OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TANNER, ROY TANNER, DEBORAH THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 27 RANDOLPH ST, APT #B, S.F., STAYED UNTIL SEP-15-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, MIDNIGHT. PLTF WAIVES RENT & DAMAGES. PLTF WILL PAY DEFTS $820- AT NOON ON 9/15/97 BY MONEY ORDER PAYABLE TO R. TANNER ($810- FOR SECURITY DEPOSIT + $10- INTEREST). ANY PROPERTY LEFT DEEMED ABANDONES. DEFTS ARE THE ONLY ADULTS LIVING ON THE PREMISES. PLTF WILL SUPPLY GOOD TELEPHONE REFERENCES.
